Target an enemy and summon a Tentacle of N'Zoth on the ground near them that will silence them and deal 117 + 75% SP Shadow damage every 2 sec for 8 seconds. If your target runs out of range, the tentacle will seek a new target.

The tentacle gains health based on your Stamina. If the tentacle dies, the silence effect will end.
